description: Collect RGB, depth, segmentation, trajectory, contact events, camera trajectory, and engine-state labels on a single deterministic timebase.
physical_assumptions: Rendering is evidence only if it can be aligned with physics trace frames.
Depth and segmentation sources must be labeled as real UE outputs or missing; placeholders are not reference-ready.
Camera trajectories are part of the sample contract, not optional UI state.
verifier_rules: Every planned view has RGB/depth/segmentation metadata or a hard failure.
Frame counts and timestamps align across physics and render streams.
Depth variance is non-zero for real depth outputs.
Source type is explicit for every render pass.
repair_suggestions: Run render sync checker before packaging.
Do not mix fallback/debug signals into UE evaluation.
Add missing camera or render pass exporters before rerunning a batch.
